name: Astrazma Urania
effectText: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 or 2 monsters you control to the hand. You can only Special Summon "Astrazma Urania" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Astrazma Urania" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can reveal any number of monsters in your hand with different Levels, then target that many face-up cards your opponent controls; negate their effects. If this card on the field is destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can add this card to your hand.
